name: EdwLoadPCAERunCycUpd

text.value: UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'EDW' AND SUBJ_CD = 'P_CAE_MBR_PRMCY' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Description:
MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2006-04-13      Suzanne Saylor          Original Programming.

2013-08-06       Archana Palivela        Original Programming.

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EDW P_CAE_MBR_PRMCY Load Indicator Update
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for P_CAE_MBR_PRMCY  with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
